default_strike.text:
Ghoul with 3 life. 1 strength, 1 bleed. Requires a ready Black Hand vampire.
The thuggee can play cards requiring basic Obfuscate [obf] as a vampire. He can inflict 1 damage on a ready vampire as a (D) action. During your unlock phase, if the number of thuggees you control is greater than the number of Black Hand vampires you control, lock all the thuggees you control.
